zh.lifeSummary: 當Goleu ferch Gruffudd於大約1140年出生在英國威爾斯時，她的父親Gruffydd ap Howel28歲，母親Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel24歲。她和Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl至少有17個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goleu ferch Gruffudd于大约1140年出生在英国威尔斯时，她的父亲Gruffydd ap Howel28岁，母亲Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel24岁。她和Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl至少有17个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Goleu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Gaelic Ó Gabhlaigh, see Gooley .
Possibly also an Americanized form of Slovenian Golej: variant of Gole .

variants.name: Gooley
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gabhlaigh, from gabhlach ‘forked’.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Goleu ferch Gruffudd was born about 1140, in Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffydd ap Howel, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, was 24. She had at least 17 sons with Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goleu ferch Gruffudd est née environ 1140, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Howel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 17 fils avec Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.

de.lifeSummary: Als Goleu ferch Gruffudd um 1140 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd ap Howel 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel 24. Sie hatte mit Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl mindestens 17 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Goleu ferch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1140 nel Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffydd ap Howel, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 17 figli con Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.

ja.lifeSummary: Goleu ferch Gruffuddが約1140年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Howelは28歳，母Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howelは24歳であった。彼女はCynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwyseglとの間に少なくとも17人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Goleu ferch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Howel(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Goleu ferch Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Howel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 17 filhos com Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goleu ferch Gruffudd родилась около 1140 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Howel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 17 сыновей от Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Goleu ferch Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1140, en Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Howel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gruffydd ap Howel, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 17 hijos con Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl.
